snippet.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng ًں’–âœ¨

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. ًں’«

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, donâ€™t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. ًںژ¶

ًں’¬ Tell us in the comments â€” is this your favorite romantic Bollywood song?

abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Aankhon mein hai khaab sa kisi
ka, abb raasta mil gaya khushi ka
Rishta naya rabba, dil chhu raha hai
Kheenche mujhe koyi dor teri ore
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

khulti fizayen khulti ghataye
sar pe naya hai aasmaan
Chaaro dishaaye haske bulaaye,
kyon sab huye hai meherbaan
Ha humane to yahi rabba
kasam se pata hai
Dil pe nahi koyi jor koyi jor
(Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore haay rabba
Teri ore, teri ore, teri ore) - (2)

Ek heer thi aur tha ek ranjha,
kehate hai mere gaanv mein
Saccha ho dil to sau muskilon
ho, jhukata naseeba pau main
Ho ho aanchal tera rabba
falak ban gaya hai
Aab iska nahi koyi oor koyi chhor

en.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng ًں’–âœ¨

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. ًں’«

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, donâ€™t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. ًںژ¶

id.description:
Rasakan keajaiban cinta dengan Teri Ore, lagu cinta dari film Singh Is Kinng ًں’–âœ¨

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. Dinyanyikan oleh Rahat Fateh Ali Khan dan Shreya Ghoshal, dengan musik oleh Pritam, Teri Ore tetap menjadi salah satu lagu cinta Bollywood yang paling dicintai.

Lagu romantis Hindi abadi ini dikenal karena melodi yang menenangkan, lirik yang menyentuh hati, dan visual yang tak terlupakan. Baik Anda sedang jatuh cinta atau sekadar menikmati musik Bollywood klasik, Teri Ore menciptakan koneksi emosional yang dalam yang akan selalu Anda ingat. ًں’«

Pasangan ikonik Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif bersinar sepanjang lagu. Untuk menikmati lebih banyak chemistry magis mereka, jangan lewatkan lagu-lagu dari Welcome, bersama dengan lagu-lagu hits lainnya dari Singh Is Kinng seperti Jee Karda, Talli Hua, dan Bhootni Ke. ًںژ¶

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Hindi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
A legacy that built Swarajya. A story that shaped history. ًںڑ©

Proudly presenting the trailer of Raja Shivaji.

Based on the life of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj - the Founder of Hindavi Swarajya.


Raja Shivaji in cinemas on 1st May 2026.
Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Written, Produced, Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music By: Ajay â€“ Atul
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)
In Cinemas 1st May
A Jio Studios Release

Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil

Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath

Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar

Jio Studios Team:
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production & Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Head â€“ Marathi Content: Nikhil Sane
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu
 
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of Indiaâ€™s Greatest Warrior King â€“ Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu

snippet.description:
Pardesiya ye Sach hai Piya | 90s Filmy Gaane | Evergreen Hits  song | Geet yug

#hindisong 

Pardesiya ye Sach hai Piya | 90s  | Old Hindi Romantic Song | Heart Touching 90s-2000s Vibe Love Song 
Step back into the golden era of Bollywood with â€œPardesiya ye Sach hai Piya | 90sâ€‌, a soul-stirring romantic track inspired by the timeless melody style of the 1990sâ€“2000s Hindi songs. This beautiful love song captures the essence of old-school romance, soothing vocals, and vintage musical charm that will touch your heart instantly.
Relive the nostalgia of retro Bollywood music with emotional lyrics, classic melodies, and a warm vintage feel  perfect for those who love old Hindi romantic songs and evergreen love stories.

snippet.title: Ek Mutthi Baadalà¥¤ New Movie Official Trailer 2026à¥¤ Aanchal Sharma, Nisha Sharma, Usha Rajak
snippet.description:
EK MUTTHI BADAL | NEW NEPALI MOVIE OFFICIAL TRAILER 2026| 2083 

AS A WEDDING APPROACHES, THE WHOLE FAMILY GATHERS, BABA, AAMA, DIDI, BAHINI, FUPU, CARRYING YEARS OF LOVE, SILENCE, AND EXPECTATION. BUT AN UNEXPECTED INCIDENT THREATENS TO SHAKE THE ENTIRE FAMILY. EK MUTTHI BADAL EXPLORES WHAT IT MEANS TO BE PART OF A FAMILY, WHAT IT MEANS TO LEAVE HOME, AND HOW ONE FINDS THEIR PLACE IN A CHANGING WORLD.

IN CINEMAS FROM MAY 15, 2026 (JESTHA 1).
AANCHAL SHARMA, NISHA SHARMA, USHA RAJAK, SAHAYOG ADHIKARI, SEKHAR CHAPAGAIN, MANISH NIRAULA, ABIRAL PRATAP ADHIKARI, GAURAV BISTA, BHIMA MAINALI, ASMITA GAUTAM

AS A WEDDING APPROACHES, THE WHOLE FAMILY GATHERS, BABA, AAMA, DIDI, BAHINI, FUPU, CARRYING YEARS OF LOVE, SILENCE, AND EXPECTATION. BUT AN UNEXPECTED INCIDENT THREATENS TO SHAKE THE ENTIRE FAMILY. EK MUTTHI BADAL EXPLORES WHAT IT MEANS TO BE PART OF A FAMILY, WHAT IT MEANS TO LEAVE HOME, AND HOW ONE FINDS THEIR PLACE IN A CHANGING WORLD.

IN CINEMAS FROM MAY 15, 2026 (JESTHA 1).
AANCHAL SHARMA, NISHA SHARMA, USHA RAJAK, SAHAYOG ADHIKARI, SEKHAR CHAPAGAIN, MANISH NIRAULA, ABIRAL PRATAP ADHIKARI, GAURAV BISTA, BHIMA MAINALI, ASMITA GAUTAM 

A Film by Sahara Sharma
Gauthali Entertainment, Mana Production Presents
 In Co-production with Third Culture Kids, Chromosom Films
Produced with the financial support of the Hubert Bals Fund + Europe Programme of International Film Festival Rotterdam
Supported by White Light Studio Co. Ltd.
 Film Bazaar India
 Film Development Board, Government of Nepal

snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk ًں§ںâ€چâ™€ï¸ڈ

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards ًں‘»

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sisterâ€™s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaosâ€”until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palaceâ€™s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present

snippet.title: Bakhuda Tumhi Ho | Atif Aslam | Alka Yagnik | Kismat Konnection | Shahid Kapoor, Vidya Balan
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Movie: Kismat Konnection
Singer(s): Atif Aslam, Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Pritam
Lyricist: Sayeed Quadri

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Ramesh S. Taurani
Director: Aziz Mirza
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Vidya Balan, Juhi Chawla, Vishal Malhotra, Om Puri, Boman Irani

Song Lyrics:

O Oo O Hoo
Hoooo
Aaaaaa
Tumhi Ehaashon Mein 
Tumhi Jazbaaton Mein 
Tumhi Lamhaton Mein 
Tumhi Din Raaton Mein

Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Har Jagah Tumhi Ho
Haan Mein Dekhon Jahan Jab
Us Jagah Tumhi Ho
Yeh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Woh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Is Zameen Se Falak Ke Darmiyan Tumhi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Beshubaar 
Tum Hi Hoo
Tum Hi Ho Mujhe Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho Tum Hi Ho
Oooooo Ooo Oooo O Oo O O O Oo

Kaise Batayein Tumhein Aur Kis Tarah Yeh 
Kitna Tumhein Hum Chahtein Hai 
Saya Bhi Tera Dikhe To Paas Jaake 
Usmein Simat Hum Jaate Hain
Rasta Tumhi Ho Rehnuma Tumhi Ho
Jiski Khwaaish Hai Humko
Woh Panah Tumhi Ho

Tum Hi Ho Besuba 
Tum Hi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Mujh Mein Haan
Tum Hi Ho

Tumhi Ehaashon Mein 
Tumhi Jazbaaton Mein 
Tumhi Lamhaton Mein 
Tumhi Din Raaton Mein

Kaise Batayein Tumhein
Shab Mein Tumhare
Khwaab Haseen Jo Aate Hain
Kaise Batayein Tumhein
Labzz Woh Saare
Jism Ko Jo Mehkate Hain
Iftida Tumhi Ho
Imtihan Tumhi Ho
Tum Ho Jeene Ka Maksad
Aur Wajah Tumhi Ho

Bakhuda Tumhi Ho
Har Jagah Tumhi Ho
Haan Mein Dekhon Mein Jahan Jab
Us Jagah Tumhi Ho
Yeh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Woh Jahaan Tumhi Ho
Is Zamee Se Falak Ke Darmiyaan Tumhi Ho
Tum Hi Ho Beshubar

Tum Hi Ho Mujhe Mein Haan

snippet.title: Bangles (Officialآ #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | à¤¬à¤¾à¤‚à¤—à¤،à¥€
snippet.description:
|| ًں•‰ ||
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

Singer - Sanju Rathod
Lyrics\Composer - Sanju Rathod
Music Produced By - G-Spark
Vocal Production & Mixed By - G-Spark
Additional Mix Mastered By - Rupendar Venkatesh @mixmagic Studios
Recorded by - Jagdish Bhandge at Apostrophe Studios

Director : Piyush - Shazia
Choreographer : Piyush â€“ Shazia

Choreographer Assistants:

Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Just one more tear to cry, one teardrop from my eye
You better save it for
The middle of the night when things aren't black and white
Enter, Troubadour
"Remember twenty-four?"

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning

[Verse 2]
This song has started now, and you're just finding out
Now isn't that a laugh?
A major sacrifice, but clueless at the time
Enter, Caroline
"Just trust me, you'll be fine"

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning
(Goodbye, goodbye, goodbye, goodbye)

[Bridge]
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man
You take the man out of the

[Chorus]
And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it
Another version of me, I was in it
Oh, I wave goodbye to the end of beginning
(Goodbye, goodbye)

snippet.title: Dil Mere Naa | Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik | Fida | Shahid Kapoor, Kareena Kapoor | 90's Love Song
snippet.description:
Dil Mere Naa | Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik | Fida | Shahid Kapoor, Kareena Kapoor | 90's Love Song

#uditnarayan #alkayagnik #romanticsongs #shahidkapoor #kareenakapoorkhan #90sromanticsongs #90severgreen 

Song Credits:
Singer(s): Udit Narayan & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films
Director: Ken Ghosh
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Fardeen Khan & Kareena Kapoor



Song Lyrics:
Dil Mere Na Aur Intezaar Kar
Dil Mere Na, Dil Mere Na Aur Intezaar Kar
Ishq Hai To Ishq Ka Izhaar Kar

Dil Mere Na Aur Intezaar Kar
Dil Mere Na, Dil Mere Na Aur Intezaar Kar
Ishq Hai To Ishq Ka Izhaar Kar

I Love You Love You Like Crazy
I Want You Want You Like Crazy
Kisi Aur Ki Na Hone Doon Main
Meri Zindagaani Hai Tu
Jise Raat Din Main Padhta Raha
Meri Voh Kahaani Hai Tu

Maine Teri Baaton Pe Yakeen Kar Liya
Baahon Ki Panaahon Mein Tujhe Bhar Liya, Aa Jaa
Jaan Kehti Hai, Jaan Kehti Hai Mujhpe Jaan Nisaar Kar
Ishq Hai To Ishq Ka Izhaar Kar

I Love You Love You Like Crazy
I Want You Want You Like Crazy

Deewaanon Se Bhi Deewaana Hai Tu
Teri Zid Se Haari Hoon Main
Mere Saathiya Mujhe Hai Pata
Teri Beqaraari Hoon Main

Khwaabon Mein Khayaalon Mein Basaake Rakhoon
Main To Tujhe Palkon Mein Chhupaake Rakhoon, Aa Jaa
Mehbooba Tu, Mehbooba Tu Mera Aitbaar Kar
Ishq Hai To Ishq Ka Izhaar Kar

I Love You Love You Like Crazy`

snippet.description:
Saajan Saajan | Lyrical Video | Dil Ka Rishta | Alka Yagnik | Kumar Sanu | Sapna Awasthi |Dance Song

Song Credits :
Song: Saajan Saajan
Movie: Dil Ka Rishta 
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu, Sapna Awasthi
Music Director : Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist : Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew :
Producer : Tips Films, Shabbir Boxwala, Aditya Rai
Director : Naresh Malhotra
Cast : Arjun Rampal, Aishwarya Rai, Priyanshu, Raakhee

Song Lyrics :

Maine Maana Ke Pyaar Ki Had Hoti Hai 
Haan Maine Maana Ke Intezar Ki Had Hoti Hai
Maine Maana Ke Dil Dhadakta Hai Sirf Tere Liye
Maine Maana Ke Ikraar Ki Had Hoti Hai
Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Kitne Deewanee Ho Gayi Main Kuch Samajh Na Aaya 
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
Ishq Mein Jeena Hai Ishq Mein Marna Hai
Ishq Bina Ab To Kuch Nahin Karna Hai
Duniya Waalo Se Ab Nahin Darna Hai
Mere Dil Ki Har Dhadkan Mein Ishq Samaya
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

Ishq Nahin Aasaan Ishq Bada Mushkil
Ishq Ke Raahi Ko Milti Nahi Manzil
Ishq Mein Kuch Bhi To Hota Nahin Haasil
Ishq Hai Kya Is Ishq Ko Koyi Samajh Na Paya
Ishq Mein Jab Jee Ghabraaya Dooriyan Dil Seh Nahin Paya
Kitne Deewanee Ho Gayi Main Kuch Samajh Na Aaya
(Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan
O More Saajan Saajan Saajan Saajan

snippet.title: Bluesss & Friends - Yabi The Goat / Hidney Manchhe Ladchha / Episode 3
snippet.description:
Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.

Nepali Ghetto Intelligence By Bluesss
 
"Bluesss & Friends" is a creative platform born from Stargang, where Bluesss steps beyond the limits of commercial validation to create freely and authentically. It is a space where music meets character bringing together some of his favorite voices and personalities from the music and film world to build something timeless.


Episode 003

â€œHidney Maanchhe Ladchhaâ€‌ is a Nepali idiom that simply means â€œa person who walks, falls", signifying that failure is a natural part of the journey towards success. YABI immediately contrasts this idea, emphasizing that while falling is inevitable, he is bound to get back up and keep racing towards his dreams. Like the idiom, he didnâ€™t just walk- he ran through the pitfalls his mom warned him about and these obstacles have shaped his journey and helped him to get to where he is now, â€œcarrying the industry on his shouldersâ€‌.

Follow all of Bluesss and Friends Releases Here: https://bluesssandfriends.com

Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol Deâ€¦
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol Deâ€¦

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

snippet.title: French Montana - Unforgettable (Lyrics) ft. Swae Lee
snippet.description:
Check out our Playlist:
https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1oJZ98sB3FbQAbrZkEbdtQ?si=_xvuL7hdQlu_oQySAWsv2A

Stream Now/Download:

ًںژ¤Letra:
[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f***ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A f***in' good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do
[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out; Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' s*** you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f**ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Oeh)
Why not? A f***in' good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do
[Verse 2: French Montana]
You ain't enough for me
Too much for you alone
Baby, go and grab some bad bitches, bring 'em home
Know the jet's on me
I'ma curve my best for you, you know
So pick up that dress for me
Leave the rest on
Too much convo for 24 hours
When you stand next to 24 karats
She left her man at home
She don't love him no more
I want your mind and your body
Don't mind nobody
So, you don't ever hurt nobody
Baby girl, work your body, work your body

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi
Why not?

[Outro: Swae Lee]
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. Itâ€™s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX â€” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything â€” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer â€œCapture the Flagâ€‌ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (â€œRobuxâ€‌). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig kunnen spelen, creأ«ren, plezier hebben en leren. Het is uniek omdat vrijwel alles op ROBLOX is ontworpen en gebouwd door leden van de community. ROBLOX is ontworpen voor jongeren van 13 tot 18 jaar, maar is toegankelijk voor mensen van alle leeftijden. Elke speler begint met het kiezen van een avatar en het geven van een identiteit. Vervolgens kunnen ze ROBLOX verkennen en interactie hebben met anderen door te chatten, games te spelen of samen te werken aan creatieve projecten. Elke speler krijgt ook een eigen stuk onontwikkeld virtueel land, samen met een virtuele gereedschapskist waarmee ze van alles kunnen ontwerpen en bouwen â€“ of het nu een begaanbare wolkenkrabber, een werkende helikopter, een gigantische flipperkast, een multiplayer 'Capture the Flag'-spel of een andere, nog te bedenken creatie is. Dit eerste stuk virtuele land is gratis. Door deel te nemen en coole dingen te bouwen, kunnen ROBLOX-leden speciale badges en ROBLOX-dollars ('Robux') verdienen. Hiermee kunnen ze vervolgens in de online catalogus winkelen om kleding en accessoires voor hun avatar te kopen, evenals premium bouwmaterialen, interactieve componenten en werkende mechanismen.

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX â€” berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun â€” baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

it.title: Roblox, ma OGNI secondo divento PIأ™ VECCHIO!
it.description:
Assicurati di guardare tutto il video per scoprire cosa succede.

Merchandising: https://foltyn.shop/

Iscriviti a questo canale per accedere a vantaggi esclusivi:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Social--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Gruppo Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nome Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Cos'أ¨ Roblox? ROBLOX أ¨ un parco giochi e laboratorio virtuale online, dove i ragazzi di tutte le etأ  possono interagire, creare, divertirsi e imparare in tutta sicurezza. La sua particolaritأ  أ¨ che praticamente tutto su ROBLOX أ¨ progettato e costruito dai membri della community. ROBLOX أ¨ pensato per ragazzi dai 13 ai 18 anni, ma أ¨ aperto a persone di tutte le etأ . Ogni giocatore inizia scegliendo un avatar e dandogli un'identitأ . Puأ² quindi esplorare ROBLOX, interagendo con gli altri tramite chat, giocando o collaborando a progetti creativi. Ogni giocatore riceve anche un proprio appezzamento di terreno virtuale non edificato, insieme a una cassetta degli attrezzi virtuale con cui progettare e costruire qualsiasi cosa: un grattacielo navigabile, un elicottero funzionante, un flipper gigante, un gioco multiplayer "Cattura la bandiera" o qualsiasi altra creazione ancora da immaginare. Questo primo appezzamento di terreno virtuale أ¨ gratuito. Partecipando e costruendo cose interessanti, i membri di ROBLOX possono guadagnare badge speciali e dollari ROBLOX ("Robux"). A loro volta, possono utilizzare questi Robux per acquistare abbigliamento e accessori per il proprio avatar, nonchأ© materiali da costruzione di alta qualitأ , componenti interattivi e meccanismi funzionanti dal catalogo online.
